metadata.description: Autonomous product loop — role-separated UI/UX design + PM planning + faithful board execution, orchestrating Google Stitch, gh-roadmap, and the harness's proven skills.

plugins.name: ultraloop
plugins.description: Three skills sharing one engine: ultraloop:design (Stitch-foundation UI/UX → cold multi-model critique → integrate → re-score loop → approved design system), ultraloop:pm (plan → write the board), ultraloop:loop (read the board → TDD + pre-merge E2E → ship). Orchestrates Google Stitch + the harness design tools + gh-roadmap + proven planning/spec/TDD/E2E skills instead of reimplementing them. Board is the single source of truth; roles and permissions are fully separated.
